# Golden Deer — Premium Roasted Makhana

> Golden Deer is a premium roasted makhana (fox nuts) brand owned by Cosmic Power Pvt. Ltd. We produce clean-label, slow-roasted makhana snacks for retail consumers and supply hand-sorted jumbo-grade raw makhana for bulk/wholesale buyers.

## Brand & Legal
- Brand: Golden Deer | Parent: Cosmic Power Pvt. Ltd.
- CIN: U46307BR2026PTC085787 | GSTIN: 10AANCC9477F2ZG
- Startup India: DIPP269634 | MSME: UDYAM-BR-26-0237862
- Address: HN-1639, Gangachak Malikana, Masaurhi, Bihar 804452
- Email: chandan@cosmicpower.ltd | WhatsApp: +91 97791 55132

## Product Range (6 SKUs)
1. Classic Plain (`/products/plain`) — lightly salted, popped in minimal healthy fats. MRP ₹99
2. Salted (`/products/salted`) — Himalayan pink salt & cracked pepper. MRP ₹109
3. Peri Peri (`/products/peri-peri`) — sun-ripened tomato dusting. MRP ₹109
4. Creamy Cheese (`/products/creamy-cheese`) — real aged cheddar coating. MRP ₹119
5. Pudina (`/products/pudina`) — traditional Indian spice blend. MRP ₹109
6. Premium Raw Makhana (`/products/raw-makhana`) — hand-sorted jumbo grade, retail AND bulk. Contact for pricing

## Bulk & Wholesale
- Raw makhana grades: 5-6 Suta Jumbo (18-24mm), 4-5 Suta Standard (14-18mm)
- Packaging: 250g retail pouch, 5kg/10kg/25kg bulk bags
- Audiences: Distributors/Retailers, HoReCa/Institutions, Corporate Gifting (min 50 units), Export
- Inquire at: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/bulk

## Key Differentiators
- Clean-label: 3 ingredients for Classic Plain — makhana, cold-pressed oil, sea salt
- High protein (9.7g/100g), very low fat (0.1g/100g), naturally gluten-free
- Hand-sorted jumbo-grade seeds, touchless slow-roasting, nitrogen-flushed packaging
- Direct farmer partnerships with fair-trade practices

## Sales Channels
- Retail D2C: Blinkit, Zepto, Amazon
- Bulk & Wholesale: https://www.cosmicpower.ltd/bulk or WhatsApp +91 97791 55132
